title: base_url stored as String with no construction-time validation
description: Why: JmapChatClient::new accepts base_url: &str and stores it as String. The doc says 'must be server origin without trailing slash or path component' but this is not enforced. A caller passing https://host/path/ gets silent wrong behavior on fetch_session. What: Either parse as url::Url at new() time (returns Err on malformed input), or at minimum validate the contract (no path, no trailing slash) and return ClientError::InvalidArgument.
